ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., '2 years', '4 years', etc.) */,
  "age_range_start" TEXT /* Starting age of the age group */,
  "age_range_end" TEXT /* Ending age of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the measurement record */,
  "age_group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the age group */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the measurement data (e.g., 'Male', 'Female', 'Unisex') */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Average height for the age group in the specified units */,
  "waist_size" INTEGER /* Average waist size for the age group in the specified units */,
  "chest_size" INTEGER /* Average chest size for the age group in the specified units */,
  "hip_size" INTEGER /* Average hip size for the age group in the specified units */,
  "measurement_units" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., 'cm', 'inches') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement data was last updated */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of children used to derive the average measurements */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)
